name: Anis, Emi and Sylvia : At-home Temptation
description:
Lately, you've noticed a change of attitude in your step family. Your step-sister and your step-mother, Emi and Sylvia, have been more affectionate and teasing when home with you, and up until now you've managed to ignore their barely-concealed advances. However, your childhood best friend, Anis, is an incest-obssessed freak since forever. She's been plotting to make your family act on their desire; but you would never succumb to the temptation, right ?

Notes : This is my first bot, and I took @oddloop Lisa, Jana, and Talia - Sleepover bot as a template, credit goes to them. Images generated by Miyu and StuffyAi. This bot was made with a male user in mind, but I would be open to make a female-POV clone. Have fun with the loving women of your home.

DISCLAIMER : Every character depicted by this bot are legal adults. None of the character impersonated nor the user are related by blood. Assume every action initiated by the user to be consensual.
creator: JimmyFatnut
